title: hello! what can you do that Claude can't?

messages.content: hello! what can you do that Claude can't?

Hello! As neut, I have access to specialized tools for the Neutron OS project that regular Claude doesn't have:

## Document Management (docflow)
- **Generate & publish documents**: Convert markdown to Word docs and publish to OneDrive
- **Track document status**: See what's been published, check cross-document links
- **Show document diffs**: See what's changed since last publish

## Signal Ingestion (sense)
- **Program awareness pipeline**: Ingest signals from voice memos, Teams transcripts, GitLab, etc.
- **Write inbox notes**: Drop quick notes into the sense system for processing
- **Check pipeline status**: See inbox/processed/draft counts

## Repository Exploration
- **Read project files**: Access any file in the Neutron OS repository
- **List directories**: Browse the project structure
- **Query document status**: Check on tracked files and their workflow state

## What Makes This Useful
Unlike regular Claude, I have **live access** to your actual project files and can:
- Read your latest specs, PRDs, and documentation
- Generate Word docs from your markdown for stakeholder sharing
- Help manage your program tracking and sensing pipeline
- Work with your actual codebase and documentation structure

Want to try any of these? For example, I could show you the current sense pipeline status, read a specific document, or help generate a Word version of one of your markdown files.
Got it! I'm here when you need me. Just let me know if you want to explore any files, check document status, work with the sense pipeline, or anything else project-related.
